rows.label: tev023301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev023301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Shelly about the weather in Primordial Wilderness.

rows.label: tev023301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev023301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Shelly if she's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev023301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Shelly about BLADE's theater of operations on Mira.

rows.label: tev023301_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Shelly if she's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev023301_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Shelly about White Woods.

rows.label: tev023301_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Shelly if she's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev023301_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Shelly about White Woods.

rows.label: tev023301_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Shelly if she's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev023301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Shelly about recent developments.

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0001
rows.name:
The weather on Mira changes abruptly
and often. They say it's as fickle
as a young lover's heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Oftentimes you'll head out on a
bright, clear morning and end up
soaked from thunderstorms by noon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Veteran BLADEs tend to carry a
wide variety of equipment in order
to respond to changing weather.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0004
rows.name:
For example, electrified weaponry is
especially effective during thunderstorms![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Did you hear about the BLADE who found
an unusual flower while she was on a
mission in Primordial Wilderness?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0011
rows.name:
It turned out to be an indigen that was just
camouflaged as a flower. Thing attacked her
out of nowhere—she's lucky she wasn't killed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0012
rows.name:
I hear the poor girl is
totally traumatized now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Even the get-well flowers she's been
receiving have left her screaming and
shaking like a leaf, poor thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0020
rows.name:
What are you talking about? This entire
planet is BLADE's theater of operations![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0021
rows.name:
BLADEs are pushing through to the far corners
of Mira—crossing fields, climbing mountains,
island hopping over seas, whatever it takes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0022
rows.name:
And when they hurt themselves doing it,
they get dragged right back here to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0023
rows.name:
But when that happens, I'll take good
care of you. So don't be afraid to get
out there and do some adventuring![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0030
rows.name:
Did you know that some particularly
dangerous indigens self-destruct
when they're near death?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0031
rows.name:
One indigen was chased down and
surrounded by an entire team of
BLADEs when it detonated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0032
rows.name:
I know because they were all
brought in here afterward—one
big happy family of injured![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0033
rows.name:
So if you're a BLADE yourself, please
be careful. Never drop your guard until
the battle is well and truly over.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0040
rows.name:
That's the continent to the far
north or northeast of here, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0041
rows.name:
Sounds like a pretty dangerous
region. We see a lot of fallen
BLADEs carried back from there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0042
rows.name:
Though some veteran BLADEs say
it's just a passage to the true
hell that lies even farther north.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0043
rows.name:
Regardless, if you're going to
White Woods, make sure that
you're especially well prepared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0050
rows.name:
Apparently some intelligent
indigens sap their target's will
to fight before they strike.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0051
rows.name:
Even after we patch them up, BLADEs that
were struck by such lethargy-inducing
attacks remain languid and dispirited.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0052
rows.name:
I try to rouse them out of it by
singing and dancing, buuuuut...yeah.
It never gets much of a reaction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0053
rows.name:
What do you BLADEs do out on the
field to raise each other's spirits?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0060
rows.name:
I heard there's an incredible scenic
viewpoint at the peak of a jagged
mountain in central White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0061
rows.name:
When the mist clears, you get a sweeping
view of the white earth below, dotted
by beautifully shimmering trees.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0062
rows.name:
I know this because some BLADEs have become
entranced by the view and ended up losing
their balance and tumbling down the mountain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0063
rows.name:
That's one hell of an endorsement! I'd
sure love to see it for myself one day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0070
rows.name:
Sometimes BLADEs get complacent
when battling indigens they've
fought dozens of times before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0071
rows.name:
Then the battle takes a turn,
the BLADE gets an unexpected
beating, and they end up here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0072
rows.name:
Any group of indigens could
contain an individual that's
far more powerful than normal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG0073
rows.name:
So even a gifted BLADE like yourself
should take every battle seriously.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG1001
rows.name:
I came to this restaurant once to escort
Ni Zain back to the maintenance center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG1002
rows.name:
But I ended up falling madly in love with the curry
they sell, and now it's the only thing I eat.
...Seriously. Every meal. Breakfast, lunch, AND dinner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG1003
rows.name:
I know I've become like a Ma-non
addicted to pizza, but I can't
help it! It's just so damn good![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG1004
rows.name:
I can't even describe what makes
it so good. It's not spicy or
sweet, really. Just...exquisite![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023301_MSG1005
rows.name:
I'm drooling just thinking
about it... Mmmrrrggghhh...
Must...have...one more bowl...[ST:wait ]
